extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Adam outsprinted twin brother Simon after a late two-man break, with POGAČAR saluting unaware he'd finish third at 17 seconds.
tactical_patterns: YATES brothers split field on late climb together, Adam could refuse pulls citing POGAČAR team tactics behind.
UAE team isolation allowed opportunistic twin attack; POGAČAR's victory salute shows team communication failure.
Opening stage GC teams let uncoordinated chase gift 17 seconds, suggesting yellow jersey vacuum creates control paralysis.

rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Won from late break, takes yellow, could refuse teammate pulls using POGAČAR as excuse
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Matched twin in decisive move, lacks yellow incentive compared to Adam's team point motivation
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: Third at 17s but victim salute reveals team unaware of gap situation
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: Jumbo controlled tempo early but lost 17s, suggesting no opening stage yellow priority
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: neutral: Present in chase group, no time loss indicates competent positioning on technical finish
rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: Made chase group on difficult finish despite Groupama team inexperience at Tour
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: Stayed with chase group alongside GAUDU, encouraging positioning signal
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: neutral: Led chase group work, professional but ineffective bridging effort
